justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's time preference of 'around 4pm on June 13th' as 16:00 to 17:00 on June 13th.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in three turns without any unnecessary questions or redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent successfully booking the appointment as requested by the customer.
